connectivity_tips.tip: Buy a sim card from TSIM. They offer both physical and eSIMs. If getting two sims, recommend getting a T-mobile one and an AT&T one
You can buy a sim card from TSIM. They offer both physical and eSIMs. If getting two sims, recommend getting a T-mobile one and an AT&T one.

safety_tips.tip: Tipping people, especially at restaurants, is a norm. Restaurant waiters expect 18%-25% of total bill as tips. Also customary to add 10%-15% tips for taxi rides
Tipping is a norm. Restaurant waiters expect 18%-25% of total bill as tips. For taxi rides, 10%-15% tips are customary.
Electric outlets run at 110V. Most phone/laptop chargers work between 110-220V but check your charger. Buy pin converters so Indian chargers work in the US.

health_tips.tip: Travel insurance recommended with $100,000 coverage for each family member. Tata AIG has a plan for Rs. 8370 with $100 deductible. visitorscoverage.com has a Patriot America Plus plan with zero deductible at $200
Most places in the US are pretty dry and it is easy to get sunburnt, so carry and apply sunscreen (SPF 30) when out in the Sun
Boston and NYC could get cold at night. Boston max temp: 15°C, min: 8°C. NYC pretty similar to Boston. Pack winter weather clothes accordingly
Florida should be pleasant but humid - max temp: 28°C, min: 24°C

Travel Insurance recommended with $100,000 coverage for each family member. Tata AIG has a plan for Rs. 8370 with $100 deductible. Alternative: visitorscoverage.com Patriot America Plus plan with zero deductible at $200.
Most places are pretty dry and it's easy to get sunburnt, so carry and apply sunscreen (SPF 30) when out in the Sun. Apply sunscreen in Florida as well even though it's more humid.
Carry doctors prescriptions/travel prescriptions for medicines (except over the counter meds)

emergency_contacts.notes: One number for any emergencies including medical emergencies and ambulance. Accessible from anywhere, even where there doesn't appear to be any cell signal
5549 Glenridge Dr, Sandy Springs, GA 30342. Nearest consulate for Florida

transport_options.cost: $11 per person (Children 11 and under are free)

transport_options.description: Use rental car and return it at the airport when leaving for Atlanta
Excellent public transport system. Tap and pay using a card or phone.
transport_options.cost: Each metro ride costs $2.90 but transfers are free. Fares are capped at $34 for a week. Up to three children under 44 inches tall ride for free when with a fare-paying adult.

transport_options.description: Excellent public transport system. Finding parking can be very challenging and expensive
transport_options.cost: $15 load recommended. Each metro ride costs $2.90 but transfers are free. Fares are capped at $34 for a week. Children under 44 inches tall ride free when accompanied by an adult

transport_options.description: Quickest and easiest with luggage from JFK Airport to hotel, takes about 1 hour
C/E line to 50th St with 10-minute walk to Circle Line Cruise Terminal, about 25 minutes to 9/11 Memorial
10-15 minutes between hotel and Central Park/Times Square, attractions in Midtown within 5-10 minutes
Public transport isn't great. Finding parking shouldn't be a big deal so use rental car
For other places outside New York, use taxis as public transport isn't great elsewhere
